message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title DeTrace Creature connection

participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_1" as W1
participant "«Creature: BBBBB»\nWheel_1" as B1
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_2" as W2
participant "B_1" as B_1
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_3" as W3
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_4" as W4
participant "«Creature: Wheel»\nWheel_5" as W5
participant "«Creature: Frame»\nFrame" as F

W1 -> W2 : 1 changeOwner
activate W2
W2 -> W2 : 2 checkMatrix
W2 -> W2 : 3 checkSlot
W2 -> W2 : 4 checkOwner
deactivate W2

W2 -x W1 : 5 connectError
W2 -> B1 : 6 cdcdcdcdcd

W3 -> F : 1 changeOwner
activate F
F -> F : 2 checkMatrix
F -> F : 3 checkOwner
F -> F : 4 checkSlot
deactivate F

W3 -> W4 : 5 connect
activate W4

W4 -> F : 6 changeOwner
activate F
F -> F : 7 checkMatrix
F -> F : 8 checkOwner
F -x F : 9 checkSlot
deactivate F

W4 -> W5 : 10 connect
activate W5

W5 -> F : 11 changeOwner
activate F
F -> F : 12 checkMatrix
F -> F : 13 checkOwner
F -> F : 14 checkSlot
deactivate F

W5 -x F : 15 connect

deactivate W5
deactivate W4

@enduml
```
